attributes.name: description
attributes.content: Call recap and next steps for Northstar.

childNodes.textContent: Technical buyers need more implementation detail
Proof is spread across too many tools
New stakeholders join late without the right context
No signal after the call to know what resonated
Start with one buyer journey, prove engagement with real visitor signals, then expand across the revenue team.
Connect the proof buyers need in one place
Personalize the recap around Northstar’s priorities
Use visit signals to guide every follow-up
